candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A summary row above EBIT at the same level as the selected XSGA component rows. variables.notes: Use the summary row only to avoid double counting, because it closely matches the sum of 'Amortization of Intangibles excluding Goodwill', 'Depreciation', and 'Depreciation of right-of-use assets'. No separate R&D expense row was selected in XRD, so the R&D exception does not block using the overall operating D&A summary for XSGA_DA.
